# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    parameters {
        choice(
            name: 'BUILD_TYPE',
            choices: ['custom', 'standard'],
            description: 'Select build type'
        )
        string(
            name: 'CUSTOM_BUILD_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Custom build commands separated by semicolon'
        )
        string(
            name: 'CUSTOM_TEST_SCRIPTS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Custom test scripts separated by semicolon'
        )
        string(
            name: 'CUSTOM_DEPLOYMENT_STEPS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Custom deployment steps separated by semicolon'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'RUN_TESTS',
            defaultValue: true,
            description: 'Run tests after build'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'DEPLOY_TO_PROD',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Deploy to production environment'
        )
    }
    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (params.BUILD_TYPE == 'custom') {
                        if (params.CUSTOM_BUILD_COMMANDS) {
                            def commands = params.CUSTOM_BUILD_COMMANDS.split(';')
                            for (command in commands) {
                                sh command.trim()
                            }
                        } else {
                            echo 'No custom build commands provided'
                        }
                    } else {
                        sh 'echo "Running standard build process"'
                        sh 'make build'
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (params.RUN_TESTS) {
                        if (params.CUSTOM_TEST_SCRIPTS) {
                            def scripts = params.CUSTOM_TEST_SCRIPTS.split(';')
                            for (script in scripts) {
                                sh script.trim()
                            }
                        } else {
                            sh 'echo "Running standard tests"'
                            sh 'make test'
                        }
                    } else {
                        echo 'Skipping tests as requested'
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Deploy') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (params.CUSTOM_DEPLOYMENT_STEPS) {
                        def steps = params.CUSTOM_DEPLOYMENT_STEPS.split(';')
                        for (step in steps) {
                            sh step.trim()
                        }
                    } else {
                        if (params.DEPLOY_TO_PROD) {
                            sh 'echo "Deploying to production"'
                            sh 'make deploy-prod'
                        } else {
                            sh 'echo "Deploying to staging"'
                            sh 'make deploy-staging'
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    post {
        always {
            echo 'Build completed'
        }
        success {
            echo 'Build succeeded'
        }
        failure {
            echo 'Build failed'
        }
    }
}
